name: io.github.Lykhoyda/ask-gemini
description: Bridge Claude with Gemini CLI for AI-to-AI collaboration, code review, and second opinions

environmentVariables.name: GMCPT_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Timeout for Gemini CLI execution in milliseconds (default: 300000 = 5 minutes)

environmentVariables.name: GMCPT_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error (default: warn)
